summary: Fixed the duplicate order issue in additional groups by implementing global deduplication for the additional order groups section. Now each order will only be sent once to additional groups regardless of which account processes it, preventing multiple accounts from sending the same order to additional groups.
current_status: The system now has complete global deduplication - both for main message processing and additional group delivery, ensuring each order is sent exactly once to all groups regardless of how many accounts are monitoring the same source groups.
